title: New UCLA graduate is among first to receive leading-edge sickle cell disease treatment at UCLA Health
summary: Samuel Idahosa, a 24-year-old UCLA graduate, has been cured of sickle cell disease after undergoing a novel gene therapy treatment at UCLA Health in 2025. The treatment was developed due to the high level of social stigma surrounding the disease in Nigeria, which has long been associated with one of the highest rates of such disease in sub-Saharan Africa, accounting for about 80% of worldwide cases. title: FDA Grants Accelerated Approval to Otarmeni, First and Only Gene Therapy for Genetic Hearing Loss
summary: The FDA has granted accelerated approval to lunsotogene parvec-cwha (Otarmeni), a gene therapy developed by Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc, for the treatment of pediatric and adult patients with severe-to-profound and profound sensorineural hearing loss (dB HL) associated with molecularly confirmed biallelic variants in the gene. This is the first gene therapy and second new molecular entity approved under the FDA Commissioner’s National Priority Voucher program. Otarmeni is designed to restore

title: Otarmeni: FDA Approves One-Time Gene Therapy for OTOF-Associated Genetic Hearing Loss
summary:
Otarmeni (lunsotogene parvec-cwha) is a single-use gene therapy for children and adults who have severe or profound hearing loss (a hearing level of more than 90 decibels) caused by confirmed changes in the OTOF gene. But for Otarmeni to work well, it is important that the affected ear has functionally intact outer hair cells and no prior cochlear implant.

title: EMA CHMP Backs Redemplo for Rare FCS Disease | GovPing
summary: EMA's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) adopted a positive opinion recommending granting a marketing authorisation in the EU for Redemplo (plozasiran), a first-in-class siRNA therapy for adults with familial chylomicronaemia syndrome (FCS). The opinion is based on a study of 75 adults showing an average 80% reduction in blood triglycerides after 10 months versus 17% with placebo, with significantly fewer acute pancreatitis cases. This positive CHMP opinion is an intermediary

title: 一瓶242万元！日本首款眼疾基因治疗药“LUXTURNA”纳入医保
summary:
一瓶242万元！日本首款眼疾基因治疗药“LUXTURNA”纳入医保医药新闻-ByDrug-一站式医药资源共享中心-医药魔方
[...]
一瓶242万元！日本首款眼疾基因治疗药“LUXTURNA”纳入医保
[...]
8月23日，据共同社报道，关于针对视网膜异常导致视物不清的“遗传性视网膜营养不良症”的基因治疗药“LUXTURNA”，日本中央社会保险医疗协议会8月23日批准其作为公费医疗保险适用对象，价格为单眼每瓶约4900万日元（约合人民币242万元），本月30日起可使用保险。
[...]
该药由制药巨头诺华制药生产销售，是日本国内首款眼疾的基因治疗药。据厚劳省称，在日本其价格仅次于疑难病“脊髓性肌萎缩症”的基因治疗药“Zolgensma”，后者售价约为1.67亿日元。LUXTURNA双眼治疗价格约为1亿日元，单眼注射一次即可。LUXTURNA的患者对象是在260多种相关基因中名为“RPE65”的基因出现异常。治疗方式是在患者视网膜下注射进正常的RPE65基因，促使眼部功能恢复。条件是要留有感光的视网膜细胞，诺华制药预计5年内有15人左右使用该药。LUXTURNA于2017年在美国获批

title: Regeneron与特朗普签约，免费提供失聪基因疗法 - Dealmoon
summary:
Regeneron与特朗普签约，免费提供失聪基因疗法 | 社区美国生活精选
[...]
# Regeneron与特朗普签约，免费提供失聪基因疗法
[...]
生物技术领域迎来了一个重磅利好消息！美国生物科技巨头 Regeneron（再生元） 刚刚与特朗普政府达成了一项里程碑式的协议：他们不仅承诺降低部分药物在美国的售价，更放出了一个大招——免费提供全球首款治疗失聪的基因疗法。
[...]
：失聪患儿
[...]
就在周四，美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）正式批准了 Regeneron 开发的基因疗法 Otarmeni。
[...]
▪️免费治疗： 这种疗法专门针对一种极其罕见的遗传性失聪。作为协议的一部分，Regeneron 承诺将向符合条件的美国患者免费提供该产品。
[...]
▪️显著疗效： 此前的临床试验显示，这种疗法已成功让多名天生全聋的儿童恢复了听力，被视为该领域的重大突破。
[...]
▪️告别人工耳蜗： 对于长期依赖人工耳蜗植入的特定患者群体来说，这无异于一次重生的机会。
[...]
Regeneron 是最新一家加入特朗普“最惠国”定价计划的制药巨头。这背后的商业逻辑也

title: FDA approves first gene therapy for genetic hearing loss - NBC News
summary: # FDA approves first gene therapy for genetic hearing loss. The FDA approved a gene-therapy drug from Regeneron to treat genetic hearing loss.Michael Nagle / Bloomberg via Getty Images file. The Food and Drug Administration on Thursday approved Regeneron’s Otarmeni, the first gene therapy for genetic hearing loss. Otarmeni is approved to treat a very rare form of hearing loss that affects about 50 babies born in the U.S. each year and is caused by a mutation in a gene called OTOF. The only other

title: New Gene Therapy For Rare Hearing Loss Wins FDA Approval—What To Know - Forbes
summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on Thursday announced the approval of Otarmeni, a gene therapy, for people with severe-to-profound or profound hearing loss associated with variants in the OTOF gene. The best treatment for hearing loss depends on the cause of hearing loss—there are other reasons someone could be born with hearing loss besides the condition for which the FDA approved the new gene therapy, for example. title: FDA clears first genetic hearing loss gene therapy - pharmaphorum
summary: **Regeneron has become the first company to get US approval for a gene therapy for congenital hearing loss, after the FDA gave a rapid clearance to its OTOF-targeting medicine Otarmeni.**.
